articles.title: Milan, negative record. 70 points and out of the top four: first time in Serie A history
articles.summary: Milan scored 70 points in a Serie A season (considering three points for a win as usual), finishing the tournament outside the top four positions for the first time in their history in the competition. Opta reports it.

articles.title: MN - The management has left, but there is a meeting underway in the locker room with Allegri. Who is present
articles.summary: San Siro has now emptied but someone still remains in the Rossoneri locker room. In fact there is a meeting underway in the locker room between Massimiliano Allegri, Mike Maignan, Matteo Gabbia and Adrien Rabiot.

articles.title: MN - Allegri also in the balance: the dismissal of the Rossoneri coach is being considered
articles.summary: Not just the sporting director Igli Tare and the managing director Giorgio Furlani. After this evening's defeat, Massimiliano Allegri's position would also be heavily in the balance.

articles.title: A disaster that overturns everything. Allegri-Milan, goodbye very close. Tare can also leave
articles.summary: The whole castle collapsed, with the moat and the crocodiles. Milan loses on the last day with the same result with which they started the championship, i.e. 1-2, but this hurts like hell.
